text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced on April 16 that they carried out multiple attacks targeting Israeli forces and positions, including a Merkava tank on the outskirts of Bint Jbeil. The group also reported drone and missile strikes allegedly targeting Israeli military…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah released footage from the operation allegedly targeting the Kiryat shmona barracks in northern Israel with a swarm of drones. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党于4月16日宣布，他们对以色列军队和阵地发动了多次袭击，包括在宾特朱拜勒郊区的一辆梅卡瓦坦克。该组织还报告称，无人机和导弹袭击了据称是以色列军事……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了据称使用无人机群袭击以色列北部谢莫纳镇军营的行动画面。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Treasury is launching Operation Economic Fury to maximize pressure on Iran — Hegseth. Operation Economic Epstein Fury!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 海格塞斯：财政部正在发起“经济愤怒行动”以最大限度地向伊朗施压。爱泼斯坦式的经济愤怒行动！

text: Hegseth: Mojtaba Khamenei is believed to still be alive, wounded and disfigured.
text_zh: 海格塞斯：据信莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊仍然活着，但已受伤且毁容。

text: Hegseth on reports that China is preparing to send arms to Iran: China has assured us that that indeed is not going to happen.
text_zh: 海格塞斯谈及有关中国准备向伊朗运送武器的报道：中国已向我们保证，这确实不会发生。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Hegseth message to Iran: We are not the same. “We're watching you. Locked and loaded on your energy industry. Ready to go at the push of a button.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 海格塞斯给伊朗的信息：我们已经不同了。“我们正在注视着你们。已经锁定并瞄准了你们的能源工业。随时准备按下一个按钮就发动攻击。”

text: Hegseth: Not a single thing has been foisted upon the President of the United States. Trump makes his own decisions about the interests of this country and defending our interest, and then working with allies and partners. In this case, Israel, who’s got a lot of will and a lot of capabilities, which we’re grateful for.
text_zh: 海格塞斯：没有任何事情是强加给美国总统的。特朗普就这个国家的利益和捍卫我们的利益做出自己的决定，然后与盟友和伙伴合作。在这种情况下，以色列拥有很强的意愿和能力，我们对此深表感谢。

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: Morale is very high.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：士气非常高昂。

text: Hegseth on NATO countries: When shots were fired and those countries were needed the most, they weren’t there. They weren’t in the strait. They weren’t alongside us.
text_zh: 海格塞斯谈北约国家：当枪声响起，这些国家最需要的时候，他们却不在场。他们不在海峡，也没有与我们并肩作战。

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: There's been no better teammate than Israel.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：没有比以色列更好的队友了。

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: Bahrain, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, and Jordan have been exceptional teammates. I had a chance to meet with both their senior leadership as well as their troops—both equally inspiring and equally committed to mutual defense. They defended Americans, and they defended their own country. It is inspiring.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：巴林、阿联酋、沙特阿拉伯、卡塔尔、科威特和约旦一直是杰出的队友。我有机会会见了他们的高层领导和部队——他们同样令人鼓舞，同样致力于共同防御。他们保卫了美国人，也保卫了自己的国家。这令人振奋。

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: The King and Crown Prince of Bahrain both personally knew our soldiers by name.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：巴林国王和王储都亲自叫得出我们士兵的名字。

text: 🇻🇦 "Jesus told us, blessed are the peacemakers, but woe to those who manipulate religion in the very name of God for their own military, economic, or political gain..." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇻🇦 “耶稣告诉我们，缔造和平的人有福了，但那些以神的名义为自己的军事、经济或政治利益而操纵宗教的人有祸了……” - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Several Israeli airstrikes targeted southern Lebanon, with a fire belt reported in the town of Al Majdil. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced on April 16 that they carried out multiple attacks targeting Israeli forces and positions, including a Merkava tank on the outskirts of Bint Jbeil. The group also reported drone and missile strikes allegedly targeting Israeli military infrastructure, including the 146th Division headquarters in Jatoun, sites near Nahariya, positions in the occupied Syrian Golan, and locations in the Shebaa Farms. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列多次空袭黎巴嫩南部，据报道阿尔马吉迪尔镇出现了火带。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党于4月16日宣布，他们对以色列军队和阵地发动了多次袭击，包括在宾特朱拜勒郊区的一辆梅卡瓦坦克。该组织还报告称，无人机和导弹袭击了据称是以色列的军事基础设施，包括位于贾通的第146师总部、纳哈里亚附近的地点、被占领的叙利亚戈兰高地的阵地以及舍巴农场的地点。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Several Israeli airstrikes targeted southern Lebanon, with a fire belt reported in the town of Al Majdil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列多轮空袭针对黎巴嫩南部，据报道阿尔马吉迪尔镇（Al Majdil）出现火带。 @wfwitness

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: We’re re-arming, we’re retooling, and we’re adjusting our tactics, techniques, and procedures. There’s no military in the world that adjusts like we do, and that’s exactly what we’re doing right now during the ceasefire.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：我们正在重新武装、重新装备，并调整我们的战术、技术和程序。世界上没有任何军队能像我们这样进行调整，而这正是我们在停火期间正在做的事情。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 2 more US-sanctioned tankers broke through the blockade. - Bloomberg: Two Iran-linked ships entered the Persian Gulf via the Strait of Hormuz today. - Tracking data shows LNG tanker “G Summer” passed between Larak and Qeshm and is now in the Persian Gulf. - Supertanker “Hang Lu” followed the same route shortly after. - Day 3 of the US naval blockade — sanctioned ships continue to pass through.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 又有两艘受美国制裁的油轮突破了封锁。- 彭博社：两艘与伊朗有关的船只今天经霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾。- 追踪数据显示，液化天然气（LNG）油轮“G Summer”号穿过拉拉克岛和格什姆岛之间，目前已进入波斯湾。- 超级油轮“Hang Lu”号紧随其后，沿相同路线航行。- 美国海军封锁的第3天——受制裁的船只仍在继续通过。

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper after returning from his Middle East visit: During both of my recent trips, I visited with our troops who were deployed across the region in more than 70 different locations.
text_zh: 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀在结束中东之行后表示：在我最近的两次行程中，我探访了部署在该地区70多个不同地点的我们的部队。

text: 🇺🇸 “We are locked and loaded against your critical dual-use infrastructure, your remaining power generation, and your energy industry,” — Pete Hegseth threatens Iran once more. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我们已锁定并装填好弹药，随时准备针对你们的关键军民两用基础设施、剩余的发电能力以及能源工业采取行动，”——皮特·赫格塞斯再次威胁伊朗。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender According to Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine, as of this morning, the U.S. Navy has not had to interdict and board any vessels during the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, as all vessels hailed by participating U.S. Navy vessels have complied with orders to turn back. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军称，截至今天上午，美国海军在霍尔木兹海峡封锁期间无需拦截和登临任何船只，因为所有被参与的美国海军舰艇呼叫的船只都遵守了掉头的命令。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hegseth: You like to say publicly you control the strait of hormuz, you can't control anything. Threatening to shoot missiles and drones at ships, that is not control. That's piracy. That's terrorism. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044753782135775297/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 赫格塞斯：你们喜欢公开宣称控制霍尔木兹海峡，但你们什么都控制不了。威胁要向船只发射导弹和无人机，那不是控制。那是海盗行为。那是恐怖主义。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044753782135775297/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Hegseth tells Iran, that they don't control the Strait of Hormuz: "Threatening to shoot missiles and drones at ships, commercial ships that are lawfully transiting international waters, that is not control, that's piracy, that's terrorism." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044753622299255284/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——赫格塞斯告诉伊朗，他们并不控制霍尔木兹海峡：“威胁要向船只，向那些合法通过国际水域的商船发射导弹和无人机，那不是控制，那是海盗行为，那是恐怖主义。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044753622299255284/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan, the ongoing blockade of all ships traveling to and from Iranian ports or believed to be transporting weapons to Iran is also expanded to all command areas of responsibility, to include the Indo-Pacific command as well. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据参谋长联席会议主席丹将军称，目前针对所有往返伊朗港口或被认为正在向伊朗运输武器的船只的封锁行动，已扩大到所有作战责任区，包括印太司令部。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 In the Zaporizhzhia direction, Ukraine’s military intelligence (HUR) special unit “Artan,” in coordination with other reconnaissance units and defense forces, is conducting a large-scale operation to liberate and clear Stepnohirsk. Reports also indicate close-range fighting between Stepnohirsk and Kamenske. 🔸 According to HUR, regaining Stepnohirsk helps straighten the front line and denies Russian forces a potential staging ground for an offensive toward Zaporizhzhia. It also expands Ukraine’s fire control over enemy logistics. 🔸 Russian sources acknowledge Ukrainian advances and highlight Kyiv’s significant advantage in drone capabilities. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇦 在扎波罗热方向，乌克兰军事情报局（HUR）特种部队“Artan”在与其他侦察部队和国防力量的协调下，正在进行大规模行动以解放和清理斯特普诺希尔斯克（Stepnohirsk）。报告还指出斯特普诺希尔斯克和卡缅斯克（Kamenske）之间发生了近距离战斗。🔸 据HUR称，收复斯特普诺希尔斯克有助于拉直前线，并剥夺了俄罗斯军队向扎波罗热发动进攻的潜在集结地。这也扩大了乌克兰对敌方后勤的火力控制。🔸 俄罗斯消息来源承认乌克兰的进展，并强调了基辅在无人机能力方面的显著优势。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel General Caine: “US forces outside the Middle East will pursue Iranian-flagged ships — or any ships — attempting to provide "material support" to Iran, including "dark fleet" vessels carrying sanctioned oil” BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 凯恩将军：“美国在中东以外的部队将追击试图向伊朗提供‘物质支持’的伊朗籍船只——或任何船只——包括运载受制裁石油的‘暗影船队’船只” 突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁行动扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌携带违禁品的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登临和扣押，此举旨在打击伊朗拥有570多艘油轮的暗影船队。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权在全球范围内适用 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的中立旗帜船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：USNAVCENT / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand)，2026年4月16日；m - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Top US General Caine: This includes dark fleet vessels carrying Iranian oil Now the U.S. can seize any Iran shadow linked vessel, anywhere in the world. (This might hurt China) BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国最高将领凯恩：这包括运载伊朗石油的暗影船队船只。现在美国可以在世界任何地方扣押任何与伊朗暗影船队有关的船只。（这可能会伤害中国） 突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁行动扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌携带违禁品的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登临和扣押，此举旨在打击伊朗拥有570多艘油轮的暗影船队。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权在全球范围内适用 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的中立旗帜船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：USNAVCENT / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand)，2026年4月16日；m - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hegseth delivers a blunt warning to Iran’s military leadership: “We’re watching you. Our capabilities are not the same, our military and yours. This is not a fair fight, and we know what assets you are moving and where.” “You have no defense industry, no ability to replenish your offensive or defensive capabilities. You only have what you have. You can move assets, but you cannot rebuild.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 赫格塞斯向伊朗军事领导层发出直言不讳的警告：“我们正在注视着你们。我们的能力与你们不同，我们的军队与你们的军队不同。这不是一场公平的战斗，我们知道你们正在转移什么资产以及转移到哪里。” “你们没有国防工业，没有补充进攻或防御能力的能力。你们只有现有的这些。你们可以转移资产，但你们无法重建。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Iran’s Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said that a ceasefire in Lebanon is just as important as a truce related to Iran, emphasizing that the two issues are closely interconnected. 🔹 He stressed that Lebanon is an “integral part” of a broader ceasefire framework and warned that any violation there could impact the overall peace process. 🟦 According to The Wall Street Journal, in the event of a ceasefire with Hezbollah, Israel aims to maintain a security buffer zone deep in southern Lebanon and retain freedom of action to strike Hezbollah military targets. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇮🇷 🇱🇧 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫表示，黎巴嫩的停火与伊朗相关的休战同样重要，并强调这两个问题紧密相连。 🔹 他强调黎巴嫩是更广泛停火框架的“不可分割的一部分”，并警告称那里的任何违规行为都可能影响整体和平进程。 🟦 据《华尔街日报》报道，如果与真主党达成停火，以色列旨在在黎巴嫩南部深处维持一个安全缓冲区，并保留打击真主党军事目标的行动自由。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel As antisemitic attacks rise across the U.S., calls are growing for Jewish Americans to be armed and prepared. The NRA says its partnership with LoxandLoaded LLC is expanding access to firearms training, education and community self-defense programs. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044751423284432953/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 随着全美反犹太主义袭击事件的增加，要求美籍犹太人武装起来并做好准备的呼声日益高涨。美国全国步枪协会（NRA）表示，其与LoxandLoaded LLC的合作正在扩大枪支培训、教育和社区自卫项目的获取渠道。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044751423284432953/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Pope Leo XIV: "Jesus told us, blessed are the peacemakers, but woe to those who manipulate religion in the very name of God for their own military, economic, or political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044750914657882364/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 新闻——教皇利奥十四世：“耶稣告诉我们，缔造和平的人有福了，但那些以神的名义为自己的军事、经济或政治利益操纵宗教，将神圣之物拖入黑暗和污秽中的人，有祸了。”https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044750914657882364/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Mohsen Rezaei, top military advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader: "I doubt that Trump will admit defeat and kill himself, he does not have the courage Hitler had. It is more likely that the Americans will arrest and imprison him when their living conditions deteriorate. We will sink all the U.S. warships." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 莫森·雷扎伊，伊朗最高领袖的最高军事顾问：“我怀疑特朗普会承认失败并自杀，他没有希特勒那样的勇气。更有可能的是，当美国人的生活条件恶化时，他们会逮捕并监禁他。我们将击沉所有美国军舰。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender The press conference with U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine, and Central Command Commander Admiral Bradley Cooper has now started. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044749488288358698/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯、参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军和中央司令部司令布拉德利·库珀海军上将的新闻发布会现已开始。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044749488288358698/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 The Lebanese Presidency confirms a call between President Aoun and Secretary Rubio. Aoun thanked Washington for its ceasefire efforts and support. Rubio "affirmed his ongoing efforts to achieve a ceasefire as a prelude to establishing peace, security, and stability in Lebanon," the Lebanese Presidency said. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 黎巴嫩总统府证实了奥恩总统与鲁比奥部长之间的通话。奥恩感谢华盛顿在停火努力和支持方面所做的工作。黎巴嫩总统府称，鲁比奥“重申了他为实现停火所做的持续努力，以此作为在黎巴嫩建立和平、安全与稳定的前奏”。推文

text: WarTranslated Police released footage of the first moments following the strike. One of the officers who arrived at the scene of the Russian crime suffered a shrapnel wound to his leg from the ballistic missile impact. He has already undergone complex surgery. Two other law enforcement officers suffered concussions. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 警方发布了袭击发生后最初时刻的录像。其中一名赶到俄罗斯犯罪现场的警官因弹道导弹撞击导致腿部受弹片伤。他已经接受了复杂的手术。另外两名执法人员受到脑震荡。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @ChristopherJM : The aftermath of a Russian FAB-1500 bomb — 1,500-kilos/3,000-pounds — dropped on the eastern Ukrainain city of Slovyansk yesterday. Photos from the 93rd brigade press officer Iryna Rybakova. Slovyansk is part of the "fortress belt" of cities — Kostyantynivka, Druzhkivka, Kramatorsk and Slovyansk — that have remained a rampart against Russian forces in eastern Ukraine since 2014. Background: https://www.ft.com/content/ec490909-80e5-48ff-a518-8185a6a5d2c7?syn-25a6b1a6=1 ФАБ-1500 у Словʼянську вчора. https://twitter.com/iryna_rybakova/status/2044659310219632756/photo/1 - Ірина Рибакова tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @ChristopherJM ：昨天投向乌克兰东部城市斯洛维扬斯克的一枚俄罗斯FAB-1500炸弹（1500公斤/3000磅）造成的后果。照片来自第93旅新闻官伊琳娜·里巴科娃。斯洛维扬斯克是“堡垒带”城市的一部分——康斯坦丁诺夫卡、德鲁日科夫卡、克拉马托尔斯克和斯洛维扬斯克——自2014年以来，这些城市一直是乌克兰东部抵御俄罗斯军队的堡垒。背景：https://www.ft.com/content/ec490909-80e5-48ff-a518-8185a6a5d2c7?syn-25a6b1a6=1 昨天斯洛维扬斯克的FAB-1500。https://twitter.com/iryna_rybakova/status/2044659310219632756/photo/1 - 伊琳娜·里巴科娃 推文

text: General Caine: As of this morning, U.S. Central Command has not been required to board any particular ships.
text_zh: 凯恩将军：截至今天上午，美国中央司令部无需登临任何特定船只。

text: General Caine: At each point, the United States Navy will transmit a warning—a young sailor, normally on the bridge of one of those destroyers. A junior officer picks up that mic and transmits, and I quote: "Do not attempt to breach the blockade. Vessels will be boarded for interdiction and seizure. Transiting to or from Iranian ports, turn around or prepare to be boarded. If you do not comply with this blockade, we will use force."
text_zh: 凯恩将军：在每一个节点，美国海军都会发出警告——通常是由那些驱逐舰舰桥上的一名年轻水手发出。一名初级军官拿起麦克风并传达，我引用：“不要试图突破封锁。船只将被登临以进行拦截和扣押。往返伊朗港口的船只，请掉头或准备接受登临。如果你不遵守此封锁，我们将使用武力。”

text: General Caine: In addition to this blockade, the Joint Force, through operations and activities in other areas of responsibility—like the Pacific area of responsibility under the command of Admiral Paparo—will actively pursue any Iranian-flagged vessel or any vessel attempting to provide material support to Iran. This includes Dark Fleet vessels carrying Iranian oil.
text_zh: 凯恩将军：除了这次封锁外，联合部队通过在其他责任区的行动和活动——例如帕帕罗海军上将指挥下的太平洋责任区——将积极追击任何伊朗籍船只或任何试图向伊朗提供物质支持的船只。这包括运载伊朗石油的暗影船队船只。

text: 🇺🇸 "Sometimes it's hard to figure out what side some of you are actually on. It's incredibly unpatriotic." - Pete Hegseth to American Media 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “有时很难弄清楚你们中的一些人到底站在哪一边。这极其不爱国。” - 皮特·赫格塞斯对美国媒体 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity over Dahieh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机在达希耶（Dahieh）上空活动。 @wfwitness

text: General Caine: The U.S. action is a blockade of Iran’s ports and coastline, not a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 凯恩将军：美国的行动是对伊朗港口和海岸线的封锁，而不是对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇸 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun received a phone call from U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who thanked him for Lebanon’s efforts to reach a ceasefire and reaffirmed US support. Rubio said he is continuing efforts to achieve a ceasefire as a prelude…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al Jadeed: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun informed Rubio of his refusal to communicate with Netanyahu based on a prior decision taken by Baabda. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩接到了美国国务卿马可·鲁比奥的电话，鲁比奥感谢他为黎巴嫩达成停火所做的努力，并重申了美国的支持。鲁比奥表示，他正在继续努力实现停火，以此作为……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al Jadeed：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告知鲁比奥，基于巴卜达（Baabda）之前做出的决定，他拒绝与内塔尼亚胡进行沟通。 @wfwitness

text: General Caine: I’d like to emphasize during this pause that the United States Joint Force remains postured and ready to resume major combat operations at literally a moment’s notice.
text_zh: 凯恩将军：我想强调的是，在此次暂停期间，美国联合部队仍保持姿态，随时准备在字面意义上的瞬间恢复重大作战行动。

text: Hegseth to the press: Where is the coverage of the new spirit in the country?
text_zh: 赫格塞斯对媒体：国内的新精神在哪里得到了报道？

text: 🇺🇸 Articles of impeachment against Hegseth unveiled: - Unauthorized war against Iran - Violations of law of armed conflict - Reckless handling of sensitive military info - Obstruction of congressional oversight - Abuse of power - Conduct bringing disrepute upon US Impeachment push led by Rep. Ansari 'almost certainly won't go anywhere in the House this year' — CBS
text_zh: 🇺🇸 针对赫格塞斯的弹劾条款公布：- 未经授权对伊朗发动战争 - 违反武装冲突法 - 鲁莽处理敏感军事信息 - 阻挠国会监督 - 滥用职权 - 损害美国声誉的行为 弹劾推动由安萨里众议员领导，“几乎肯定今年在众议院不会有任何进展” —— CBS

text: Hegseth attacks the press again: I sat there in church, and I thought: our press are just like these Pharisees. Not all of you. Not all of you. But the legacy Trump-hating press—you’re politically motivated animus for President Trump nearly completely blinds you from the brilliance of our American warriors.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯再次抨击媒体：我坐在教堂里，我想：我们的媒体就像这些法利赛人。不是你们所有人。不是你们所有人。但那些仇视特朗普的传统媒体——你们对特朗普总统的政治动机敌意，几乎完全蒙蔽了你们，使你们看不到我们美国勇士的辉煌。

text: Hegseth attacks the press again: I just can’t help but notice the endless stream of garbage from the media. The relentlessly negative coverage. Sometimes, it’s hard to figure out what side some of you are actually on. It’s incredibly unpatriotic.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯再次抨击媒体：我忍不住注意到媒体源源不断的垃圾信息。无休止的负面报道。有时，很难弄清楚你们中的一些人到底站在哪一边。这极其不爱国。

text: Hegseth: The U.S. military moved seamlessly from major combat operations to a world-class blockade. We can make that transition again very quickly and even more powerfully than ever. At the direction of President Trump, the war department will ensure that Iran never has a nuclear weapon—never. We’d prefer to do it the nice way, through a deal led by our great vice president and negotiating team, or we can do it the hard way.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：美军从重大作战行动无缝过渡到了世界级的封锁。我们可以再次非常迅速地进行这种过渡，而且比以往任何时候都更加强大。在特朗普总统的指示下，战争部将确保伊朗永远不会拥有核武器——永远不会。我们更愿意以友好的方式，通过由我们伟大的副总统和谈判团队领导的协议来完成，或者我们可以用强硬的方式来完成。

text: Hegseth: As our negotiators have said, you, Iran, can choose a prosperous future, a golden bridge, and we hope that you do for the people of Iran. In the meantime, and for as long as it takes, we will maintain this blockade, successful blockade. But if Iran chooses poorly? Then they will have a blockade and bombs dropping on infrastructure, power, and energy. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and our friends over at Treasury are launching "Operation Economic Fury" as well, maximizing economic pressure.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：正如我们的谈判代表所说，伊朗，你们可以选择一个繁荣的未来，一座金桥，我们希望你们为伊朗人民这样做。在此期间，只要需要，我们将维持这种封锁，成功的封锁。但如果伊朗做出了错误的选择呢？那么他们将面临封锁，炸弹将落在基础设施、电力和能源上。财政部长斯科特·贝森特和我们在财政部的伙伴们也正在发起“经济愤怒行动”，最大限度地施加经济压力。

text: Hegseth: Threatening to shoot missiles and drones at ships—commercial ships that are lawfully transiting international waters—that is not control. That’s piracy. That’s terrorism.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：威胁要向船只——那些合法通过国际水域的商船——发射导弹和无人机，那不是控制。那是海盗行为。那是恐怖主义。

text: Hegseth: You like to say publicly, Iran, that you control the Strait of Hormuz, but you don’t have a Navy or real domain awareness. You can’t control anything.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：伊朗，你们喜欢公开宣称你们控制了霍尔木兹海峡，但你们没有海军，也没有真正的领域感知能力。你们什么都控制不了。
